privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How {dealerName} handles your personal data
privacy.s1body: {dealerName}, org.nr {orgNr}, {city}. Contact for data protection queries: {email}
privacy.s2body: BankID: name, personal identity number, signature timestamp, OCSP verification. Roaring.io / SPAR (Swedish Population Register): registered address, gender, date of birth, protected identity flag. Manual: email address, telephone number. Purchase history: contracts, invoices, vehicles (make, model, VIN, registration number).
privacy.s3body: Performance of contract (6.1b): processing needed to fulfil a purchase agreement. Legal obligation (6.1c): bookkeeping (Bokföringslagen 7 years), anti-money-laundering checks. Legitimate interests (6.1f): customer relationship management, credit assessment. Consent (6.1a): marketing communications — withdrawable at any time.
privacy.s4title: How long do we keep your data?
privacy.s4body: Transaction data (contracts, invoices): 7 years (Bokföringslagen). Customer profile: for the duration of the customer relationship + 3 years. BankID logs: 5 years. Leads without purchase: 1 year.
privacy.s5title: Who do we share data with?
privacy.s5body: BankID AB (Bankgirot) — identity verification. Roaring Technologies AB — SPAR population register lookups. Payment service providers: Svea, Klarna, Swish, Nets and others depending on chosen payment method. Fortnox AB — accounting integration. Transportstyrelsen (Swedish Transport Agency) — vehicle ownership registration.
privacy.s6body: You have the right to: access your data, rectify inaccurate data, erasure (subject to Bokföringslagen 7-year retention), restrict processing, data portability (export in machine-readable format), object to processing based on legitimate interest. Submit requests to: {email}
privacy.s7body: BankID risk classification (Low/Medium/High) is used as an advisory indicator only. It is not legally binding and can be challenged by contacting us.
privacy.s8body: We use only strictly necessary cookies: a session cookie for authentication and a locale cookie for language preference. No tracking or marketing cookies are used.
privacy.s9body: If you have concerns about how we handle your data, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Swedish Data Protection Authority (Integritetsskyddsmyndigheten, IMY), Box 8114, 104 20 Stockholm, www.imy.se.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: BikeMeNow — Dealership Platform by {dealerName}
terms.s1body: BikeMeNow is a SaaS platform for motorcycle dealerships registered in Sweden with a valid F-tax certificate (F-skattebevis). The service includes CRM, lead management, purchase agreements, and payment integrations.
terms.s2body: Use requires a registered organisation number, a valid F-tax certificate, and at least one administrator identified via BankID. By subscribing you confirm compliance with these requirements.
terms.s3body: The subscriber is responsible for all activity under their account credentials. BankID authentication is required for administrative actions. Notify us immediately of any unauthorised access.
terms.s4body: All prices include 25% VAT. A 14-day free trial is available with no payment required. Billing is monthly or annually. Cancellation must be submitted at least 30 days before the next billing period. No refunds for a period already started.
terms.s5body: The software and design belong to {dealerName}. Customer data is owned by the subscriber and can be exported upon termination.
terms.s6body: {dealerName} is not liable for indirect damages, loss of profit, or system failures. Maximum liability is limited to 3 months' subscription fee.
terms.s7body: This agreement is governed by Swedish law. Disputes are in the first instance referred to the Swedish National Board for Consumer Disputes (ARN, www.arn.se). Failing resolution, disputes are settled by Stockholm District Court.
